subtitle: Manage stickers collected by the agent and browse the full image perception index (data source for text-to-image / image-to-image search)
uploadFailed: Upload failed, check image format and size
noStickers: No stickers yet. Upload one, or let the agent collect with collect_sticker in chat
noImages: Image index is empty. Images seen in chat are indexed automatically
imagesHint: Images sent/received in chat are indexed here automatically, powering search_image (text-to-image) and find_similar_image (image-to-image). Removing only drops the index record, not the file.
descriptionPlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-generate with the vision model (content + emotion + usage context)
tagsPlaceholder: Comma separated, e.g.: happy, cat, thumbs-up
deleteConfirm: Delete sticker {{id}}? The image file and index will be removed.
removeImageConfirm: Remove this image from the index? The original file will not be deleted.
